title: Another Grace For A Child
content:
Here a little child I stand
Heaving up my either hand;
Cold as paddocks though they be,
Here I lift them up to Thee,
For a benison to fall
On our meat, and on us all. Amen.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Another Grace For A Child"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
